{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114081593C4B8FA157AAED201E3"}"},"total":2207},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6826122633814261767","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写的很有代入感，有的时候会有身临其境的感觉，半夜看有时会有一丝丝害怕，但总是忍不住想去看下一章，写的很真实也很详细，让我忍不住会认为作者就是位阴阳师。看过这个之后也可以去看看作者另一篇《茅山道士传奇》，都超级赞👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1589330527,"group_id":"6568661711283293188","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"阳光大男孩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwhxRzjJEsAWbg3Kt2jXTCM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9871c00c4bde41e1b2b4c1ad34cc8c84~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618627&x-signature=8s5nfFdbD4yGjOBZzsH4%2FdNx6GI%3D","user_id":"101393213986","user_name":"☞超哥哥☜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101393213986","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742240497,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6568661711283293188","book_info":{"abstract":"行一生江湖，讲一段民间鬼事，民间山野怪谈，一直充斥着人们的茶余饭后，民间关于山野鬼神之事更是传的五花八门。
有一种奇人，不但能帮人起坟下葬，点选宅邸，还可以断生死，道天机，除邪煞，过阴曹，救人度命，去灾免祸，这就是阴阳先生。
